title: Kidney Health Awareness
description: Join us to spread awareness about kidney health.
details: This event focuses on educating the public about kidney disease prevention and early detection.

title: Free Medical Outreach
description: Providing free kidney screening and consultation.
details: Free screening for blood pressure, sugar levels, and kidney function for underserved communities.

title: Fundraising Gala
details: An elegant fundraising dinner aimed at raising funds for dialysis and transplant support.

title: Youth Health Seminar
description: Educating young people on healthy living.
details: Interactive sessions teaching students how to maintain kidney-friendly lifestyles.

title: Community Walk
details: A public awareness walk with free flyers and health talks.

title: Dialysis Support Drive
details: Support program aimed at subsidizing dialysis treatments.

title: Volunteer Training
details: Equipping volunteers with skills to assist in outreach programs.

title: School Outreach
details: Teaching students about hydration and kidney care.

title: Charity Football Match
details: A fun football match to raise awareness and funds.

title: World Kidney Day Event
details: Celebrating World Kidney Day with talks, screenings, and media campaigns.
